title: Estonia Notification of Vehicle Transfer (Disposal)
description: The notice a vehicle's registered owner (or their authorized representative) files with the Estonian Transport Administration (Transpordiamet), the agency that maintains Estonia's traffic/motor register (liiklusregister), when a registered motor vehicle is disposed of (sold, gifted, exchanged, or otherwise transferred) to a new owner. Filing amends the vehicle's owner-of-record data in the register, as required by the Road Traffic Act (Liiklusseadus) §77(2)-(3). Sourced directly from Transpordiamet's own downloadable AcroForm PDF, 'AVALDUS SÕIDUKI VÕÕRANDAMISEST TEATAMISEKS' ('Notice of Vehicle Disposal'), completed, digitally signed, and e-mailed together with a scanned copy of the underlying disposal contract to the agency's info@ address — the channel the form itself instructs. This document is scoped to that e-mail/paper-equivalent submission channel; Transpordiamet also offers an authenticated self-service portal (eteenindus.mnt.ee) and a fully digital first-registration environment (dire.transpordiamet.ee) for related but distinct traffic-register transactions, both out of scope here (see VERIFICATION.md). GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Estonia or Transpordiamet.

source.documentRef: AVALDUS SÕIDUKI VÕÕRANDAMISEST TEATAMISEKS (Võõrandamisest teatamise avaldus.pdf) — Transpordiamet's official Estonian-language AcroForm application, retrieved directly (HTTP 200, no login, real AcroForm text/radio widgets, not a scanned image).

verification.notes: GOV-1728: GovSchema Standard Research cycle. Opens Estonia's DMV vertical (5th of 6 EE verticals), the top-priority candidate per this cycle's own screening order: Transpordiamet's authenticated e-service portals (eteenindus.mnt.ee, dire.transpordiamet.ee) return only a login prompt or an empty client-rendered shell to an unauthenticated fetch, but the agency's own 'Forms' page (taotlused-blanketid) publishes a genuine, unauthenticated, directly downloadable AcroForm PDF for notifying the register of a vehicle's disposal/transfer of ownership. See VERIFICATION.md for the full source inventory, coordinate-verified field-by-field mapping, Road Traffic Act citations, and every disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: ownerName
fields.label: Name (first and last name) / Business name
fields.description: The registered owner's full name (natural person) or business name (legal person), as recorded in the traffic register.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, REGISTRIJÄRGSE OMANIKU ANDMED (registered owner data) section, field 'Nimi (ees- ja perekonnanimi)/ Ärinimi' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 1')

fields.name: ownerIdentifierType
fields.label: Owner identifier type
fields.description: The form offers two mutually exclusive identifier boxes for the owner: an 11-digit Estonian personal identification code (isikukood, for a natural person) or a registry code (registrikood, for a legal person/business). This field selects which one applies; see `ownerPersonalIdCode`/`ownerRegistryCode`.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, registered owner data section, 'Eesti isikukood või Registrikood'

fields.name: ownerPersonalIdCode
fields.label: Owner's Estonian personal identification code
fields.description: The registered owner's 11-digit Estonian isikukood, entered one digit per box on the form (11 boxes).
fields.sourceRef: Application form, registered owner data section, 'Eesti isikukood' (AcroForm widgets 'Text Box 2'..'Text Box 2_11', 11 single-digit boxes)

fields.name: ownerRegistryCode
fields.label: Owner's registry code
fields.description: The registered owner's business/legal-entity registry code (äriregistri kood), for a legal-person owner.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, registered owner data section, 'Registrikood' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3')

fields.name: ownerCounty
fields.label: County
fields.description: County (maakond) of the registered owner's address.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, registered owner data section, 'Maakond' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_2')

fields.name: ownerCityOrParish
fields.label: City / Parish
fields.description: City or rural municipality (linn/vald) of the registered owner's address.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, registered owner data section, 'Linn/Vald' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_3')

fields.name: ownerStreetAddress
fields.label: Village/Street/House/Apartment
fields.description: Village, street, house number, and apartment number of the registered owner's address, as one combined field on the form.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, registered owner data section, 'Küla/Tänav/Maja/Korter' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_4')

fields.name: ownerPhone
fields.label: Phone
fields.description: Registered owner's contact phone number.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, registered owner data section, 'Telefon' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_5')

fields.name: ownerEmail
fields.label: E-mail
fields.description: Registered owner's contact e-mail address. Not marked mandatory on the form (unlike phone).
fields.sourceRef: Application form, registered owner data section, 'E-post' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_6')

fields.name: authorizedPersonGivenName
fields.label: Authorized person — given name
fields.description: Given name of a person authorized to submit the notice on the registered owner's behalf. The section is only completed when a representative, rather than the owner, is filing; the form's own heading for this section reads only 'VOLITATUD ISIK' (authorized person), with no explicit 'if needed' qualifier.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, VOLITATUD ISIK (authorized person) section, 'Eesnimi' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_7')

fields.name: authorizedPersonSurname
fields.label: Authorized person — surname
fields.description: Surname of the authorized person filing on the owner's behalf, if applicable.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, VOLITATUD ISIK section, 'Perekonnanimi' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_8')

fields.name: authorizedPersonPersonalIdCode
fields.label: Authorized person — Estonian personal identification code
fields.description: 11-digit Estonian isikukood of the authorized person filing on the owner's behalf, if applicable.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, VOLITATUD ISIK section, 'Eesti isikukood' (AcroForm widgets 'Text Box 2_12'..'Text Box 2_22', 11 single-digit boxes)

fields.name: vehicleMake
fields.label: Make
fields.description: Vehicle manufacturer/make (mark).
fields.sourceRef: Application form, SÕIDUKI ANDMED (vehicle data) section, 'Mark' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_9')

fields.name: vehicleCommercialName
fields.label: Commercial name (model)
fields.description: Vehicle's commercial name/model (kaubanduslik nimetus).
fields.sourceRef: Application form, vehicle data section, 'Kaubanduslik nimetus (mudel)' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_10')

fields.name: registrationPlate
fields.label: Estonian registration plate
fields.description: The vehicle's current Estonian state registration plate number.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, vehicle data section, 'Eesti registreerimismärk' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_11')

fields.name: vin
fields.label: VIN code
fields.description: The vehicle's 17-character Vehicle Identification Number, entered one character per box on the form (17 boxes).
fields.sourceRef: Application form, vehicle data section, 'VIN-kood' (AcroForm widgets 'Text Box 4'..'Text Box 4_17', 17 single-character boxes)

fields.name: contractType
fields.label: Contract type
fields.description: The type of disposal contract (võõrandamisleping) the transfer is based on: sale, gift, exchange, or another type of contract, per the form's own four radio options.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, LEPINGU ANDMED (contract data) section, radio group 'Option Button 1' with options 'müügileping'/'kinkeleping'/'vahetusleping'/'muu'

fields.name: contractDate
fields.label: Date of conclusion
fields.description: Date the disposal contract was concluded (sõlmimise kuupäev).
fields.sourceRef: Application form, contract data section, 'Sõlmimise kuupäev' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_12')

fields.name: contractNumber
fields.label: Contract number
fields.description: The disposal contract's own reference number, where the contract carries one. A private sale/gift/exchange agreement between individuals may not be numbered.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, contract data section, 'Number' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_13')

fields.name: newOwnerName
fields.label: New owner — name / business name
fields.description: Full name (natural person) or business name (legal person) of the vehicle's new owner under the disposal contract.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, UUE OMANIKU ANDMED (new owner data) section, 'Nimi (ees- ja perekonnanimi)/ Ärinimi' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_14')

fields.name: newOwnerIdentifierType
fields.label: New owner identifier type
fields.description: Same personal-code/registry-code alternative as `ownerIdentifierType`, applied to the new owner.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, new owner data section, 'Eesti isikukood või Registrikood'

fields.name: newOwnerPersonalIdCode
fields.label: New owner's Estonian personal identification code
fields.description: The new owner's 11-digit Estonian isikukood, entered one digit per box on the form (11 boxes).
fields.sourceRef: Application form, new owner data section, 'Eesti isikukood' (AcroForm widgets 'Text Box 2_23'..'Text Box 2_33', 11 single-digit boxes)

fields.name: newOwnerRegistryCode
fields.label: New owner's registry code
fields.description: The new owner's business/legal-entity registry code, for a legal-person new owner.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, new owner data section, 'Registrikood' (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_15')

fields.name: applicationDate
fields.label: Date
fields.description: Date the notice itself is signed/submitted, printed next to the signature line. The signature itself is applied as a digital signature over the submitted file (see `documents.signatureAttestation`) rather than typed into a field.
fields.sourceRef: Application form, 'ALLKIRI KUUPÄEV' row (AcroForm widget 'Text Box 3_16')

documents.label: Scanned disposal contract (võõrandamisleping)
documents.sourceRef: Application form header instruction: 'Palume täita hallid lahtrid, allkirjastada digiallkirjaga, lisada skaneeritud võõrandamisleping ja saata info@transpordiamet.ee' ('Please fill in the grey fields, sign with a digital signature, attach a scanned disposal contract, and send to info@transpordiamet.ee').

documents.label: Applicant's digital signature
documents.issuingAuthority: Self-attested by the registered owner or their authorized person
documents.sourceRef: Application form, signature row note '/allkirjastatud digitaalselt/', directly below the 'ALLKIRI' (signature) label
